# Zeurion

> Zeurion sells one-time sponsor prospecting reports for niche B2B newsletter operators (2,000 to 50,000 subscribers): 30 brands with dated, publicly linked evidence that they already sponsor comparable newsletters or podcasts, one contact per brand with an honest verification status, a ready-to-send pitch for each, a pricing recommendation benchmarked on public rate cards, and a 14-day execution plan. €349 one-time, no commission, no marketplace. Every claim on this site links to a public, dated source.

Method, stated plainly: observations come from public archives only (newsletter issues, podcast feeds, sponsor pages, press releases), each with a date and a URL. No email address is guessed. No brand is contacted on anyone's behalf.

## Product

- [Home](https://www.zeurion.ai/): what the report contains, pricing, plain-language FAQ
- [Sample entries](https://www.zeurion.ai/sample): three full entries from a real report, prepared for a cybersecurity newsletter (~15,000 subscribers, operator anonymized)

## Free data

- [Who sponsors newsletters, by vertical](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/): hub of brands observed paying for newsletter and podcast sponsorships, with dates, formats and source links
- [Cybersecurity](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/cybersecurity)
- [Data engineering](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/data-engineering)
- [Health tech](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/health-tech)
- [Climate](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/climate)
- [Finance and CFO](https://www.zeurion.ai/who-sponsors/finance-cfo)
- [Sponsorship rate calculator](https://www.zeurion.ai/calculator): estimate a newsletter's sponsorship rates from documented public benchmarks
